form.formComment: Last start was well back in the run when 6th (Fr4) over 2080m at Cranbourne well beaten by Desert Assassin (2:38.40) in NR up to 57 on March 29 at $5. Before that, 8th (Fr4) over 2240m after racing wide at this track well beaten by Aldebaran Brooke (2:49.60) in 0W/15 0K stake on March 14 at $15. Draws well so can do a lot better.

form.formComment: Last start was well beaten into fourth behind Jilliby Ballerini at Terang over 2680m in a No NR on March 27 at $51. form.formComment: First up. At the last run she won by 1.2 m after showing early speed, (Fr5) at Globe Derby Park (2:57.60) beating Sassy Galleon in 3yo LR No NR F on November 3 at $2.10 at the bell was leading 1.5m on the pegs. Has won when fresh before and was readied with two trials.

form.formComment: Five-year-old gelding who has plenty of ability. Unlucky last start 10th (Fr6) over 1720m after showing early speed and racing wide at this track beaten 25 m by Kyvalley Jetstream (2:06.00) in 0W/15 0K stake on March 28 at $26. Not out of this despite the second-row draw. Better than recent form suggests and is a great chance to bounce back.
